## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Update Alpha_va to be SI units in q_calculation. Simplified gamma functions according to the fact that gamma(x) = (x-1) gamma(x-1) .

title: Update Alpha_va and Gamma Functions
